segments.text: Then the Lord said to Joshua,
Do not be afraid; do not be discouraged. Take the whole army with you, and go up and attack Ai. For I have delivered into your hands the king of Ai, his people, his city and his land.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: You shall do to Ai and its king as you did to Jericho and its king, except that you may carry off their plunder and livestock for yourselves. Set an ambush behind the city.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: So Joshua and the whole army moved out to attack Ai. He chose thirty thousand of his best fighting men and sent them out at night
Listen carefully. You are to set an ambush behind the city. Don't go very far from it. All of you be on the alert.
segments.speaker: Joshua

segments.text: I and all those with me will advance on the city, and when the men come out against us, as they did before, we will flee from them.
segments.speaker: Joshua

segments.text: They will pursue us until we have lured them away from the city, for they will say, 'They are running away from us as they did before.' So when we flee from them,
segments.speaker: Joshua

segments.text: you are to rise up from ambush and take the city. The Lord your God will give it into your hand.
segments.speaker: Joshua

segments.text: When you have taken the city, set it on fire. Do what the Lord has commanded. See to it; you have my orders.
segments.speaker: Joshua

segments.text: Then the Lord said to Joshua,
Hold out toward Ai the javelin that is in your hand, for into your hand I will deliver the city.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: He impaled the body of the king of Ai on a pole and left it there until evening. At sunset, Joshua ordered them to take the body from the pole and throw it down at the entrance of the city gate. And they raised a large pile of rocks over it, which remains to this day.

verses.title: The Covenant Renewed at Mount Ebal

segments.text: Afterward, Joshua read all the words of the law—the blessings and the curses—just as it is written in the Book of the Law.
